sections.title: If the player does not have at least 875 coins and has not paid for permanent access

lines.speaker: Saniboch
lines.text: I'll want 875 coins to let you enter; this is a dungeon for the more wealthy discerning adventurer. Begone with you, riff raff.

sections.title: If the player has at least 875 coins, but less than 1 million coins
If the player has not paid for permanent access

lines.speaker: Saniboch
lines.text: Many thanks. You may now pass the door. May your death be a glorious one!

lines.speaker: Saniboch
lines.text: Many thanks. You may now pass the door as many times as you wish, and I will not charge you again. May your death be a glorious one!

sections.title: If the player has paid to enter once

lines.speaker: Saniboch
lines.text: You have already given me lovely coins, so you may go in, and may your death be a glorious one!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, thanks.

sections.title: If the player has paid for permanent access

lines.speaker: Saniboch
lines.text: You have already given me lots of nice coins, you may go in.

lines.speaker: Saniboch
lines.text: Good day to you, Bwana.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I go through that door please?

lines.speaker: Saniboch
lines.text: Most certainly, you have already given me lots of nice coins.

lines.speaker: Saniboch
lines.text: Most certainly, but I must charge you the sum of 875 coins first.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I haven't got that much money with me.

lines.speaker: Saniboch
lines.text: I'll want 875 coins to let you enter; this is a dungeon for the more wealthy discerning adventurer. Begone with you, riff raff.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, here's 875 coins.

lines.speaker: Saniboch
lines.text: Many thanks. You may now pass the door. May your death be a glorious one!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why is it worth the entry cost?

lines.speaker: Saniboch
lines.text: It leads to a huge fearsome dungeon, populated by giants and strange dogs. Adventurers come from all around to explore its depths.

lines.speaker: Saniboch
lines.text: I know not what lies deeper in myself, for my skills in agility and woodcutting are inadequate, but I hear tell of even greater dangers deeper in.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I pay you for permanent access?

lines.speaker: Saniboch
lines.text: I suppose so, yes. My employer will let you in for free, forever, in exchange for 1,000,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I haven't got 1,000,000 coins with me.

lines.speaker: Saniboch
lines.text: Then perhaps you would rather pay 875 coins for one visit.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, here's 1,000,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Saniboch
lines.text: Many thanks. You may now pass the door as many times as you wish, and I will not charge you again. May your death be a glorious one!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Never mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where does this strange entrance lead?

lines.speaker: Saniboch
lines.text: To a huge fearsome dungeon, populated by giants and strange dogs. Adventurers come from all around to explore its depths.

lines.speaker: Saniboch
lines.text: I know not what lies deeper in myself, for my skills in agility and woodcutting are inadequate.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm impressed, that tree is growing on that shed.

lines.speaker: Saniboch
lines.text: My employer tells me it is an uncommon sort of tree called the Fyburglars tree.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Good day to you too.

lines.speaker: Saniboch
lines.text: My guard dogs can do puzzles better than that!

lines.speaker: Saniboch
lines.text: Excellent work!

lines.speaker: Saniboch
lines.text: You're not done yet! Do this for me!
